channel.title: nerd shit on pretentiousUsername
channel.description: Recent content in nerd shit on pretentiousUsername

item.title: Anime review: *Keep your hands off Eizouken!*
item.description: Honestly, I don’t think any other show will come close to Keep your hands off Eizouken!, and not to their own detriment. Eizouken is a show unlike any other that I’ve seen—it’s bold, imaginative, and incredibly well animated, all while keeping a story with relatively few stakes, and only three main characters. The show’s plot is somewhat self-explanatory—three high school girls make a club to produce anime, hijinks ensue. In many ways, the plot is low-stakes—characters are never in any serious danger;1 and the only violence in the show is both for comedic effect, and never ends up hurting anyone.
